page.title: Submit a Project
page.subtitle: Share your project with the community. Fill in the details below.

websiteUrl.label: Website URL
websiteUrl.help: Enter your website URL and click Auto Fill to automatically populate the form.
websiteUrl.duplicateWarning: ⚠️ This URL has already been submitted. The final step will block this — please use a different URL.

sourceLocale.label: Description language
sourceLocale.help: Pick the language you're writing the description in. Other languages will be auto-translated.

productImage.label: Product Image
productImage.help: Add a product image. Recommended: 16:9 aspect ratio (e.g., 800x450px).

tags.label: Product Tags
tags.help: Add up to 10 tags to help users discover your project. Press Enter or comma to add.

platforms.label: Platforms
platforms.help: Select all platforms your project supports.

infoBanner.heading: Select your launch type and date
infoBanner.body: All launches happen at {hour}:00 UTC. We launch a limited number of projects each day.

badgeCard.heading: 🚀 Want to Launch Tomorrow?
badgeCard.body: Skip the queue! Add our badge to your website and launch the next day instead of waiting weeks or months.
badgeCard.urlRequired: Please enter your website URL first
badgeCard.notFound: Badge not found on your website
badgeCard.verifyFailed: Failed to verify badge. Please try again.

badgeVerified.heading: ✅ Badge Verified!
badgeVerified.body: You now have access to the Badge Fast Track! Choose your launch quota below.

quota.heading: Select Launch Quota
quota.warningBody: aat.ee will automatically check for the badge on your website monthly. Projects without the badge will be removed.

free.name: Free Launch
free.displayBadge: 2. Display our badge on your site

date.label: Launch Date
date.empty: No available launch dates found for the selected type in the allowed range.

premiumUpsell.heading: Launch {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} earlier with Premium!
premiumUpsell.body: Available from {date} • Guaranteed DR{dr} backlink • Skip the queue

readyToSubmit.heading: Ready to submit?
readyToSubmit.body: Please review all information carefully. Once submitted, your project will be scheduled for launch.
readyToSubmit.paymentRedirect: You will be redirected to the payment page after submission.

fields.websiteUrlInvalidQuick: Please enter a valid URL first
